headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Darden Restaurants (DRI) After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Wondering whether Darden Restaurants at around US$200.91 is offering value or asking you to pay up for quality? This article focuses squarely on what the current share price might mean for you. The stock is up 1.3% over the past week and 2.4% over the last month. Year to date it is up 7.3%, while the return over the last year is a decline of 4.2%, so recent moves sit against a mixed set of trailing returns.
